parameters.apprise_url_plus: octopush://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.api_login_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.api_key_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Octopush destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise octopush:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into an Octopush SMS Campaign API JSON body and post it to api.octopush.com (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"recipients":[{"phone_number":"${ customer_secrets.OCTOPUSH_SMS_TO }"}],"text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and ": " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *},"purpose":"alert","sender":"${ customer_secrets.OCTOPUSH_SMS_FROM }"}
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Octopush destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to Octopush SMS Campaign API (no Apprise)

api_key_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Octopush api key

api_login_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Octopush api login

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Octopush targets
